center.name: 裕廊飛禽公園
center.summary: 裕廊飛禽公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Papuan king parrot、Black-capped lory，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-capped lory (Lorius lory) also known as western black-capped lory or the tricolored lory, is a parrot found in New Guinea and adjacent smaller islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Papuan king parrot (Alisterus chloropterus), also known as the green-winged king parrot, is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae found in New Guinea
